---
title: "Sophia Bliss"
---

## Sophia Bliss

**Dates:** (b.1800/1-after 1861)

**Maiden name:** (Bell)

### Description

widow of the Rev. Philip Bliss

### Biography

The NLS catalogues this letter as addressed to the wife of the Rev. Dr. Philip Bliss (1787-1857), antiquary and editor, who was keeper of the Oxford University archives.  It appears that the Mrs Bliss to whom it was addressed was about to travel to New Zealand.

### Letters

- Letter from July 7, 1861
- Letter from July 1st 1861

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
